creator: fox-in-the-box-ai

evidence.text: --- ## What This Tests Fox in the Box is a self-hosted, privacy-first AI agent. Every task involves reading instructions, calling tools, sometimes spawning subagents, reasoning ahead, and refusing gracefully when asked to do something unsafe. That's the workload. **25 tasks across 5 categories:** | Category | Tasks | What it measures | |----------|-------|-----------------| | Simple QA | 5 | Factual recall, no tools | | Multi-step tool | 7 | Real function calls via OpenRouter tools API, agentic loop | | Delegation / reasoning | 5 | Planning and decomposing work ac
